description_long: This is a single-story bungalow surrounded by a wooden fence, featuring a spacious front yard with a paved driveway leading to a garage. The main structure is rectangular with a flat roof and includes a covered entryway flanked by landscaped flower beds. The backyard is expansive and grassy, bordered by the same wooden fencing, and there are rows of shrubs and flowering plants along the sides of the house. The exterior walls are light-colored, likely finished in stucco or painted concrete, and the windows are arranged in a linear pattern along the sides. The garage is attached and accessible from the driveway, while the main entrance is set back with a small porch area. The overall design is modern and functional, emphasizing open outdoor space and privacy.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof, attached garage, and landscaped front and back yards, all enclosed by a wooden fence.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, driveway, garage, and landscaped entry path with flower beds.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the long, flat-roofed structure, side garden, and expansive grassy backyard.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the garage, back of the house, and large open backyard with minimal landscaping.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the side garden, entry path, and the open lawn area extending to the rear.
